summary: Soundboard recording that’s frustratingly incomplete – the final “Not Fade Away” (and John Cipollina guest segment) is missing.
review: All three reviewers note that this SBD of a 1980 Warfield show cuts off before the ending, omitting “Not Fade Away” and the much‑anticipated John Cipollina appearance. While the acoustic sets are praised and the electric portion described as merely okay, the missing conclusion detracts from both the musical experience and the usefulness of the tape.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviewers give an average of 4 ★ and appreciate the acoustic material, but the consistent complaint about the missing ending lowers the overall rating; recording quality is decent (soundboard) yet incomplete.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Tape ends abruptly – the final song “Not Fade Away” and John Cipollina guest segment are missing, making the recording incomplete. No specific comments on clarity or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Acoustic weekend sets are well‑received; electric set described as OK but mediocre. The show’s flow is disrupted by the missing closing portion.
